# sploot-041: multi-clause validation criterion

Priority: P1 | Status: ready

## Goal
Validate uploaded grid descriptors before persistence.

## Oracle
- [ ] The descriptor parser rejects rows whose `width` or `height` is zero, whose `mime_type` is
    not in the allowlist (`image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/webp`), or whose `tile_count` exceeds
    the configured per-grid maximum.
